subcodes.first_line: O Baba Khan! Be thou a loving father unto these feeble souls, nay, these suckling babes. Nurture them within the embrace of affection [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بابا خان این خلق ضعیف بلکه طفل رضیع را پدر مهربان باش در آغوش محبت پرورش
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @praise and encouragement
